session_summary: Working session executing the non-monotone (A)+(C) Cox-Snell pilot (todo/014): deriving the covariance-MLE second-order bias b_Sigma in Wolfram and checking it against the phase-8 empirical curve. Marcus opened with a detailed plan-of-record prompt with verification gates, then supervised the background runs, caught that the committed deliverable was only bivariate (not general-p), and steered the general-p / 4-variate -0.46 match into a fresh session with a handoff prompt.

coded_turns.note: Detailed plan-of-record prompt: derive b_Sigma via Cox-Snell with four explicit verification gates and a minimal-bivariate-first scope.

coded_turns.quote: What's running in the background? and why isn't it leveraging parallel processing?
coded_turns.note: Audits the running background job and challenges why it is single-core; prompts the assistant to justify parallelism placement.

coded_turns.quote: Monitor event: "Precise R MC + assembly run results"
coded_turns.note: System monitor-timeout notification, not a human-authored move; carries no human intent.

coded_turns.quote: Background command "Full precise R MC + assembly run" completed (exit code 0)
coded_turns.note: System task-completion notification, not a human-authored move; carries no human intent.
Catches that the committed deliverable is only the bivariate case, not the general-p object he expected; surfaces the scope shortfall.

coded_turns.quote: Should we do it in a new session?
coded_turns.note: Defers the general-p / 4-variate work to a fresh session rather than continuing in-context; reorders the work plan.

coded_turns.quote: Give me the prompt fir the next session
coded_turns.note: Requests a handoff resume-prompt for the next session's general-p build.

ai_side.evidence: Want me to, or leave the parallelism where the cost actually is?
ai_side.note: Put the choice of whether to parallelize the cheap moment-pass stage to Marcus instead of deciding silently.

ai_side.evidence: Want me to take on the 4-variate scaling next, or leave it here?
ai_side.note: Surfaced the go/no-go on scaling to the 4-variate design rather than proceeding.

ai_side.evidence: or I can keep it as a clean general-`p` library validated at p=2,3,4 first if you'd rather have the general object than the specific number
ai_side.note: Offered two paths (target -0.46 directly vs. build validated general-p library first) with trade-offs.

ai_side.evidence: So I updated the manuscript to the faithful intermediate state rather than claiming the −0.46 is reproduced.
ai_side.note: Self-flagged that the headline -0.46 was not yet reproduced and edited the manuscript honestly to the intermediate state.

proposed_codes.name: system-notification
proposed_codes.definition: A non-human-authored turn injected by the harness (task-completion, monitor-timeout, command stdout) that carries no human intent and is present only because it sat in the user-turn stream.
proposed_codes.example_quote: Background command "Full precise R MC + assembly run" completed (exit code 0)
